hooks.command: branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Direct edits on '$branch' branch are not allowed. Create a feature branch first."; exit 2; fi

file=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$file" ] || [ ! -f "$file" ]; then exit 0; fi; ext="${file##*.}"; case "$ext" in js|ts|jsx|tsx|json|css|html|md) prettier --write "$file" 2>/dev/null || true ;; py) black "$file" 2>/dev/null || true ;; go) gofmt -w "$file" 2>/dev/null || true ;; sh|bash) shfmt -w "$file" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac
context="$HOME/claude-os/memory/context.md"; if [ -f "$context" ]; then echo "--- Loaded context.md ---"; cat "$context"; echo "--- End context.md ---"; fi
echo ""; echo "Session ending. If anything important was decided, learned, or changed — update ~/claude-os/memory/context.md before closing."
